title: Typed LRU Cache With TTL
topic: Implement a typed LRU cache with TTL, eviction stats, and tests.
prompt: Implement a typed LRU cache with TTL support. It should support get, set, has, delete, clear, size, max size enforcement, least-recently-used eviction, per-entry TTL expiration, and stats for hits, misses, evictions, and expired entries. Add focused tests for recency refresh, TTL behavior, updates, deletes, and capacity eviction.
successCriteria: The cache is generic over key and value types.
Expired entries are not returned and are counted.
Stats are accurate across hits, misses, evictions, deletes, and clear.
